meta.title: The F-22 is more powerful than the SR-71 and the 737?! #f22 #f22raptor
meta.description:
The F-22 Raptor is powered by a pair of groundbreaking P&W F119 afterburning turbofan engines that give it an absolutely immense amount of power. 

Stay on top of all things Defense Tech by subscribing to Sandboxx News!
